examples.text: slowing the body's ability to renew itself. With age, cells increasingly grow senescent, too, a process that halts the cell cycle in times of risk, like when cancer cells are proliferating. But the response also kicks in more as we age,
examples.explanation: 这里的 halts 表示“使停止、让……中断”。句子在说：当出现风险时（比如癌细胞正在增殖），细胞衰老这一过程会让细胞周期停下来，防止细胞继续分裂。

source.text: 我们身体为何会老化？ - 莫妮咔 玛抐斯妮
